productDisplayName: Lotto Men Grey Dolce Vita Shoes
description: Style NoteDesigned for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, theDolce Vita shoe from lotto comes with a durable upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you stable on various surfaces.Product DetailsGrey shoe with green trims has a foamy rubber upper with mesh inlays on the forefoot and rearfoot, perforations on the midfoot area and central lace-upsMeshed inner with a padded footbed and branding on the tongur and heel collarOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe region to act as the toe guardPhylon midsole for lightweight comfortDurable lotto lite outsole with punto flex grooves and waffle pattern lugs all overWarranty: 3 monthsnbsp;Material and CareRubberWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
